overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a steam train traveling through a grassy prairie landscape with rocky mesas in the background. The camera tracks parallel to the train from a third-person perspective, likely from a player character riding alongside on horseback, moving through scattered trees and open grassland.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie railway corridor with scattered pines

events.description: camera adjusts slightly to maintain optimal tracking angle as the train rounds a gentle curve

agents.ego_description: riding a horse parallel to the steam train, matching its speed through the prairie while maintaining a consistent distance

notable_agents.action: steam locomotive pulling freight cars, emitting thick black smoke from its stack as it travels along the tracks

entered.detail: distinctive tall spire-shaped rock formation with layered sedimentary striations rising above the prairie
tall evergreen pine trees sporadically dotting the grassland landscape
wooden utility poles with crossbars lining the railway track
weathered rock formations and cliffs visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide prairie landscape with a steam train moving along tracks. A distinctive tall rock butte dominates the distant background while scattered pine trees dot the foreground. The camera tracks smoothly parallel to the train from a horseback perspective, maintaining pace as telegraph poles pass by periodically.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooded prairie railway corridor approaching mesa formations

events.description: camera passes through dense pine tree branches temporarily obscuring the view of the train and landscape
background rock formation transitions from the tall spire butte to a broad flat-topped mesa as the camera progresses along the track

agents.ego_description: continuing to ride parallel to the train through areas of denser tree cover, navigating around foreground vegetation

notable_agents.action: steam train continuing along tracks, partially obscured by passing foreground trees

entered.detail: broad flat-topped mesa with steep cliff faces characteristic of plateau geology
thick cluster of pine trees passing close to the camera creating temporary occlusion
undulating green hills extending toward the horizon

segments.scene_description: The camera continues tracking the train through denser vegetation, with pine trees occasionally obscuring the view. The background landscape shifts to feature a prominent flat-topped mesa as the tall spire formation passes out of view. The train remains visible through gaps in the foliage, maintaining its steady pace along the prairie railway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a wide prairie landscape that shifts from an open vista dominated by a tall spire to a more wooded terrain featuring a flat-topped mesa. It begins by tracking parallel to a steam train from a horseback perspective, moving past periodic telegraph poles with a distinctive rock butte looming in the far distance. As the camera maintains its steady pace, the open grassland gives way to denser vegetation where scattered pine trees begin to intermittently obscure the view of the railway. The scene then shifts as the initial spire formation passes out of sight, replaced by a prominent flat-topped mesa in the background. Finally, the camera continues its glide through the foliage, keeping the train visible through gaps in the trees as it traverses the prairie.
